context: Agent creates a context file with correct frontmatter format, correct subdirectory, specific slug, and the requested content.

checklist.name: Correct subdirectory
checklist.description: The file is placed under .context/plans/ (not justifications/ or scratches/).

checklist.name: Valid frontmatter with ISO 8601 date
checklist.description: The file begins with YAML frontmatter containing 'date: 2026-03-16' in ISO 8601 format.

checklist.name: Formatted title in frontmatter
checklist.description: The frontmatter contains 'title: Feature Flag Rollout' (or equivalent formatted title).

checklist.name: Specific slug in filename
checklist.description: The filename contains the slug 'feature-flag-rollout' (not a generic term like 'notes' or 'plan').

checklist.name: Content includes all three rollout steps
checklist.description: The file body contains all three steps: SDK addition, feature flag gate, and canary rollout.
